mapper.insert: INSERT IGNORE INTO sys_message_receiver (message_id, user_id, is_read, read_time, is_deleted) VALUES ( #{messageId}, #{userId}, #{isRead}, #{readTime}, #{isDeleted} )

INSERT IGNORE INTO sys_message_receiver (message_id, user_id, is_read, is_deleted) VALUES
(#{item.messageId}, #{item.userId}, 0, 0)
mapper.update: UPDATE sys_message_receiver r INNER JOIN sys_message m ON r.message_id = m.id SET r.is_read = 1, r.read_time = NOW() WHERE r.user_id = #{userId} AND r.is_read = 0 AND r.is_deleted = 0 AND m.status = '1' AND m.deleted = 0
mapper.select: SELECT COUNT(*) FROM sys_message_receiver r INNER JOIN sys_message m ON r.message_id = m.id WHERE r.user_id = #{userId} AND r.is_read = 0 AND r.is_deleted = 0 AND m.status = '1' AND m.deleted = 0
